---
title: "Introduction"

editor: visual
knitr: true
bibliography: CaribicusIntro.bib
---

Introduction

This is a study of galliwasps on the island of Hispaniola with an emphasis on the genus *Caribicus*.

![Caribicus warreni, captive specimen, Nashville Zoo, 2022.](images/Haitian_galliwasp_nashvillezoo.jpg){fig-align="center"}

*Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y %H:%M')`*
